# Corben's Source Corpus

This appendix is generated from `sources/source_inventory.json` and current chapter assignments in `book_structure.json`.

This appendix is only for Corben's authored, supplied, or local-project ASI Stack source corpus: authored papers, local-project source routes, recovered architecture notes, implementation references, variants, and public-safe source records that are not marked as third-party external literature.

It is not a claim that every source has been ingested, summarized, citation-normalized, or independently verified. Source-derived claims should not be promoted until the relevant source has a source note and Appendix C has been updated.

External and third-party sources are a separate appendix: [Appendix H, External Sources and Literature](H_external_sources.qmd).

## Ownership Boundary

| Appendix | Contains | Does not contain | Evidence effect |
|---|---|---|---|
| Appendix G: Corben's Source Corpus | Corben-supplied or Corben-authored ASI Stack papers, local-project source routes, implementation references, recovered notes, variants, and public-safe corpus records. | Third-party literature records marked `external_literature`. | Organizes the internal architecture corpus; it does not promote any claim unless the source note, Appendix C mapping, and evidence transition support that move. |
| Appendix H: External Sources and Literature | Third-party papers, official documentation, outside benchmarks, and other non-Corben references used for comparison or grounding. | Corben's supplied/authored corpus and local project records. | Organizes outside context; it does not claim reproduced results or support-state promotion without a reproduction or accepted evidence transition. |

| Source ID | Title | Priority | Layer | Link | Current use | Bibliographic status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `viea` | Verified Intent-to-Execution Architecture | `must_use` | `whole_stack_execution_spine` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1SDu8MWw4dOpFqwLqA8vpE1rV98O2_GeJgVlgb6R9GsM) | asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); human-intent-as-a-formal-input (Human Intent as a Formal Input); stable-capability-fields (Stable Capability Fields); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); intent-to-execution-contracts (Intent-to-Execution Contracts); command-contracts-and-semantic-interfaces (Command Contracts and Semantic Interfaces); planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer); cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); virtual-context-abi (Virtual Context ABI); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); labor-os-and-typed-jobs (Labor OS and Typed Jobs); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); moecot-runtime-and-multi-core-orchestration (MoECOT Runtime and Multi-Core Orchestration); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `scf` | Stable Capability Fields | `must_use` | `governance_recursive_self_improvement` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1hQ9LqEgpeHo2SAntUVk15Eegms_xRVfOhtndVM5TDS4) | asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); stable-capability-fields (Stable Capability Fields); capability-replacement-and-rollback (Capability Replacement and Rollback); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); moecot-runtime-and-multi-core-orchestration (MoECOT Runtime and Multi-Core Orchestration); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `planforge` | PlanForge | `must_use` | `planning_control` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12mSs7u6JxrtVQ_GbNpBY7lXCA5uyE62Lx91gi_VRjgo) | human-intent-as-a-formal-input (Human Intent as a Formal Input); planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer); planforge-dags-and-intelligence-arbitrage (PlanForge DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `planforge_compiler_arch` | PlanForge: A Compiler Architecture for AI Task Orchestration | `must_use_variant` | `planning_control` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ute1JJLsMfQyRFgKKveSr8U-w_MM-hk5fGxm7Vp5z1o) | planforge-dags-and-intelligence-arbitrage (PlanForge DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `cognitive_compilation` | Cognitive Compilation | `must_use` | `planning_semantic_ir` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1spEWiRnk1NUFuK3BLh3X80r_Up_SyebO1c3JSEzTUis) | human-intent-as-a-formal-input (Human Intent as a Formal Input); command-contracts-and-semantic-interfaces (Command Contracts and Semantic Interfaces); planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer); planforge-dags-and-intelligence-arbitrage (PlanForge DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); semantic-representation-and-tree-structured-models (Semantic Representation and Tree-Structured Models); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `talos` | Talos Protocol | `must_use` | `labor_execution_os` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1IRHwojXgcGx4INJsVx8uMYu4vJGl6H5O9w_l_01VcyU) | asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); human-intent-as-a-formal-input (Human Intent as a Formal Input); stable-capability-fields (Stable Capability Fields); capability-replacement-and-rollback (Capability Replacement and Rollback); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); intent-to-execution-contracts (Intent-to-Execution Contracts); command-contracts-and-semantic-interfaces (Command Contracts and Semantic Interfaces); unified-adaptive-tribunal-and-adversarial-review (Unified Adaptive Tribunal and Adversarial Review); labor-os-and-typed-jobs (Labor OS and Typed Jobs); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); moecot-runtime-and-multi-core-orchestration (MoECOT Runtime and Multi-Core Orchestration); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `talos_md` | Talos_Protocol_v1.0.md | `must_use_variant` | `labor_execution_os` | [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1vCXRSKiE2C5ngmo7KHhPBBTtzVvr2ki-) | labor-os-and-typed-jobs (Labor OS and Typed Jobs) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `vcm_public` | Virtual_Context_Memory_v1 | `must_use` | `memory_context` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1fid_RDNJcY3gM5WfqTpz5RABpzzoehWU4QKGhurRyJM) | failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); virtual-context-abi (Virtual Context ABI); semantic-pages-context-cells-and-certificates (Semantic Pages, Context Cells, and Certificates); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy (Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts (Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `vcm_editable` | Virtual_Context_Memory_v1.0_Editable | `must_use_variant` | `memory_context` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1D5RifUx-1Eq_WluCrS9FUcf3qt4X7I6_n21YD2ffB0w) | failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); virtual-context-abi (Virtual Context ABI); semantic-pages-context-cells-and-certificates (Semantic Pages, Context Cells, and Certificates); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy (Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `spinoza` | Proof of Belief / The Spinoza Architecture | `must_use` | `reasoning_epistemology` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Y90DBgxsOJImMXi4aOrwxtbyjlkVZpCzu1YJy_SFatk) | failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment Substrate); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty and Value Conflict); governance-rights-fork-exit-and-audit (Governance Rights: Fork, Exit, and Audit); semantic-pages-context-cells-and-certificates (Semantic Pages, Context Cells, and Certificates); verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy (Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Spinoza Verification and Proof-Carrying Claims); unified-adaptive-tribunal-and-adversarial-review (Unified Adaptive Tribunal and Adversarial Review); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); semantic-representation-and-tree-structured-models (Semantic Representation and Tree-Structured Models); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `spinoza_composer` | Spinoza Composer / Spinoza Trinity | `supporting` | `reasoning_media_compliance` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1pWHPNCFL5dnphZxKUhj5c_yk3juskWQZPTzPjxE7nEE) | artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `moecot` | MoECOT-Agent Architecture Whitepaper | `must_use` | `implementation_reference` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Lw5qjIFLK1gxGxqYw3_zLneFF5JT_Ihn5VI1CntjtvM) | asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); stable-capability-fields (Stable Capability Fields); capability-replacement-and-rollback (Capability Replacement and Rollback); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); intent-to-execution-contracts (Intent-to-Execution Contracts); planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer); planforge-dags-and-intelligence-arbitrage (PlanForge DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); virtual-context-abi (Virtual Context ABI); labor-os-and-typed-jobs (Labor OS and Typed Jobs); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); moecot-runtime-and-multi-core-orchestration (MoECOT Runtime and Multi-Core Orchestration); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `moecot_md` | moecot_agent_whitepaper.md | `must_use_variant` | `implementation_reference` | [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1F0KW0-TR54xKGeetIPkDTV1Tn5_9w3i0) | moecot-runtime-and-multi-core-orchestration (MoECOT Runtime and Multi-Core Orchestration); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `octopus_router` | Octopus Router Architecture | `must_use` | `routing_modular_intelligence` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Ew0fdnJf9crnGrQDckzNEc5fFniZviayqQfGIR3TBMY) | routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); moecot-runtime-and-multi-core-orchestration (MoECOT Runtime and Multi-Core Orchestration); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `rmi` | Ratcheting Modular Intelligence | `must_use` | `capability_ratchet` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/16ULc3Y82TuqkFGBpjKyhrEVZYt9_Vlvatq2kiO-q1VI) | the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); capability-replacement-and-rollback (Capability Replacement and Rollback); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); moecot-runtime-and-multi-core-orchestration (MoECOT Runtime and Multi-Core Orchestration); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems and Residual Honesty); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `cognitive_loop_closure` | Cognitive Loop Closure | `must_use` | `procedural_memory` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12yac3ZpHv3dRk2-0u627rn-gFkqGQWY4jsIJwAW9YeQ) | capability-replacement-and-rollback (Capability Replacement and Rollback); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `benchmaxxing` | Benchmaxxing: The Performance Ratchet | `must_use` | `benchmarks_evidence` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1m1EycQk56VDh1Rg3IY8GYwkebIVn3bGAWIHs93a3628) | evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); capability-replacement-and-rollback (Capability Replacement and Rollback); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); moecot-runtime-and-multi-core-orchestration (MoECOT Runtime and Multi-Core Orchestration); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `cgs` | Compact Generative Systems | `must_use` | `compression_representation` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1y8IW-rnDSM8-q1KUnLfqKTGobwCoHoBwuMJ4-gCcw3M) | the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems and Residual Honesty); generate-verify-repair-compression (Generate-Verify-Repair Compression); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression (RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression); semantic-representation-and-tree-structured-models (Semantic Representation and Tree-Structured Models); simulation-fidelity-and-physical-constraints (Simulation Fidelity and Physical Constraints); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `rgs` | Ratcheting Generative Systems | `supporting` | `compression_capability_growth` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jxbgwiBzgUgdTjpPiOkEQNZz2ehcDioTG-lUBV-f4FA) | procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems and Residual Honesty) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `rankfold_neuralfold` | RankFold + NeuralFold | `must_use` | `compression_representation` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1-9wujZDobutPQbAml3H3QqYvdt9GIk55bxJiaPeSUhg) | the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); generate-verify-repair-compression (Generate-Verify-Repair Compression); rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression (RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression); simulation-fidelity-and-physical-constraints (Simulation Fidelity and Physical Constraints) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `rankfold_compressor` | rankFold compressor | `must_use_variant` | `compression_representation` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/11jw0DAAuUvw75Q_1AiwTiUGcd-y_IywB9qdEka9_MfI) | rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression (RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `bbvca_v9` | BBVCA_v9_final_public_release | `must_use` | `compression_representation` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1dCcqTteePCyUb66H3qJ-50uYMNDdqHFG7-qQpHSvVaA) | the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); generate-verify-repair-compression (Generate-Verify-Repair Compression); rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression (RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `bbvca_main` | Big Bang Volumetric Compression Architecture | `must_use_variant` | `compression_representation` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tlgJismt6JaYv_jaf2XbwCX7WEqj9FJ0WvEtbHYS_-E) | generate-verify-repair-compression (Generate-Verify-Repair Compression) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `genesiscode` | GenesisCode | `must_use` | `executable_specification` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1w4gKcF9a7oV6hsUECsWeEafblvc78ZusxaxdUTfLR2M) | system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); intent-to-execution-contracts (Intent-to-Execution Contracts); command-contracts-and-semantic-interfaces (Command Contracts and Semantic Interfaces); cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Spinoza Verification and Proof-Carrying Claims); labor-os-and-typed-jobs (Labor OS and Typed Jobs); artifact-graphs-audit-logs-and-replay (Artifact Graphs, Audit Logs, and Replay); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `alignment_field` | Field of God / Alignment Field family | `must_use` | `alignment_constitution` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1CCiBBlOEGB2huRDSwGm4P1JkVBkfmaUxJt9AwG23Kzw) | constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment Substrate); agency-dignity-and-corrigibility (Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty and Value Conflict); governance-rights-fork-exit-and-audit (Governance Rights: Fork, Exit, and Audit); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); simulation-fidelity-and-physical-constraints (Simulation Fidelity and Physical Constraints); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `field_of_god` | The Field of God | `must_use_variant` | `alignment_constitution` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1BDVLQqIeDm-PFijrg6oKaCbRtUyY--_waw88tnU9tj0) | failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment Substrate); agency-dignity-and-corrigibility (Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `field_of_god_ai_constitution` | Field of God AI Constitution | `core_alignment_source` | `constitutional_alignment_runtime_governance` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/personality-documents/field_of_god_ai_constitution_v1.md) | constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment Substrate); agency-dignity-and-corrigibility (Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty and Value Conflict); governance-rights-fork-exit-and-audit (Governance Rights: Fork, Exit, and Audit); recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `ethica_mechanica` | Ethica Mechanica | `must_use_variant` | `alignment_constitution` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/15cN9D6s2bvAPoitp6Imh7deE3gCebqG4RbaSRGRd5GA) | constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment Substrate); agency-dignity-and-corrigibility (Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty and Value Conflict); governance-rights-fork-exit-and-audit (Governance Rights: Fork, Exit, and Audit) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `eternal_code` | The Eternal Code / unified God, reality, conscious, alignment | `must_use_variant` | `alignment_constitution` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ZMqR7CMSnzignSbHdm38q9jSAXGMRsIoz3jOz3qmVrc) | constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment Substrate); agency-dignity-and-corrigibility (Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `coherence_exchange` | The Coherence Exchange | `strong_support` | `epistemic_market_synthesis` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RUeBKp_UnRVIMc2oPBT2j3xm-HBa81Y4VqTckPhCeJc) | evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); constitutional-alignment-substrate (Constitutional Alignment Substrate); agency-dignity-and-corrigibility (Agency, Dignity, and Corrigibility); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty and Value Conflict); governance-rights-fork-exit-and-audit (Governance Rights: Fork, Exit, and Audit); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); planforge-dags-and-intelligence-arbitrage (PlanForge DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Spinoza Verification and Proof-Carrying Claims); unified-adaptive-tribunal-and-adversarial-review (Unified Adaptive Tribunal and Adversarial Review); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `verification_bandwidth` | Verification Bandwidth in Bounded Contexts | `strong_support` | `context_verification_theory` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1T34n1Ya6_joaAD8ZxygOpiEuNzEVj3G8_nf0xZuFL2U) | evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); virtual-context-abi (Virtual Context ABI); semantic-pages-context-cells-and-certificates (Semantic Pages, Context Cells, and Certificates); verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy (Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Spinoza Verification and Proof-Carrying Claims); unified-adaptive-tribunal-and-adversarial-review (Unified Adaptive Tribunal and Adversarial Review); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); semantic-representation-and-tree-structured-models (Semantic Representation and Tree-Structured Models); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `beastbrain` | BeastBrain Cognitive Architecture | `supporting_lineage` | `whole_stack_lineage` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1PVLtICJVZm36c6M2y9JkuMZF9nfu_6pyR1SXqFzknME) | asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); moecot-runtime-and-multi-core-orchestration (MoECOT Runtime and Multi-Core Orchestration); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `beastbrain_timeless` | BeastBrain Architecture: Timeless Edition | `supporting_lineage` | `whole_stack_lineage` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12g8s3R_v0mJ7GXaOoWeWkqHWBQWe_iGmcTmUwChZLwg) | the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `aletheia` | Aletheia Foundry | `supporting_lineage` | `safe_general_intelligence_lineage` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1H6M_IPbuu86FOQurv2rLQ97EYQVdThZ2U7njl0DBpIE) | asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `context_engineer` | Context Engineer / Manhattan Protocol | `supporting_lineage` | `memory_context_lineage` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xXP364s9IZ4DFmRHTmBELviRQkJcQ55McIUokioRFdo) | security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); virtual-context-abi (Virtual Context ABI); semantic-pages-context-cells-and-certificates (Semantic Pages, Context Cells, and Certificates); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `black_hole_context_manager` | Black Hole Context Manager | `supporting_lineage` | `memory_context_lineage` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/14KPQT5d86HaFZzQdUr_Sn5p7-8cscSqIZm5zxkijl-I) | context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `ladon_manhattan` | Ladon & The Manhattan Protocol | `supporting_lineage` | `security_governance` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1uT9iQ7Jb2TsU9DletvtVeLEej63aIQl3WS3jTsMgtSM) | system-boundaries-and-authority (System Boundaries and Authority); governance-rights-fork-exit-and-audit (Governance Rights: Fork, Exit, and Audit); stable-capability-fields (Stable Capability Fields); security-kernel-and-digital-scifs (Security Kernel and Digital SCIFs); context-transactions-snapshots-mounts-and-taint (Context Transactions, Snapshots, Mounts, and Taint); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `uat` | Unified Adaptive Tribunal | `supporting_lineage` | `evaluation_refinement` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1R7wKo2qg5waosEa-SwC-JKF77qoDiiEp1Df4Gbap0VE) | evidence-states-and-claim-discipline (Evidence States and Claim Discipline); moral-uncertainty-and-value-conflict (Moral Uncertainty and Value Conflict); governance-rights-fork-exit-and-audit (Governance Rights: Fork, Exit, and Audit); claim-ledgers-and-belief-revision (Claim Ledgers and Belief Revision); unified-adaptive-tribunal-and-adversarial-review (Unified Adaptive Tribunal and Adversarial Review); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `treellm` | TreeLLM | `supporting_lineage` | `semantic_representation` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/17C98P4WhU4srqrT83xXpopRvwHO19zRFJ_ov0MWhgHE) | cognitive-compilation-and-semantic-ir (Cognitive Compilation and Semantic IR); verification-bandwidth-and-context-adequacy (Verification Bandwidth and Context Adequacy); spinoza-verification-and-proof-carrying-claims (Spinoza Verification and Proof-Carrying Claims); semantic-representation-and-tree-structured-models (Semantic Representation and Tree-Structured Models); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `software_magic_grimoire` | Software Magic Grimoire | `supporting_lineage` | `command_contracts_promptcraft` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1UjGadqJ3ZiqfLgbac0APtV_OLnlSZAkIW0o0r37YdBo) | human-intent-as-a-formal-input (Human Intent as a Formal Input); intent-to-execution-contracts (Intent-to-Execution Contracts); command-contracts-and-semantic-interfaces (Command Contracts and Semantic Interfaces); planning-as-a-control-layer (Planning as a Control Layer); labor-os-and-typed-jobs (Labor OS and Typed Jobs); runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `road_to_agi` | Road To AGI | `supporting_lineage` | `strategic_roadmap` | [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1FfYjqa36tMQ4s4KLbPPnIOZNfQefuT7p) | benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `simulation_scaling` | Simulation Scaling Law | `optional_support` | `compute_fidelity_constraints` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1rt0lnpwZ9X6M_ejLC7PYHQSXsvajYICGo4ETS-ndUFA) | the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems and Residual Honesty); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); simulation-fidelity-and-physical-constraints (Simulation Fidelity and Physical Constraints); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `tokenmana` | TokenMana | `optional_support` | `resource_economics` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1dGOlGPZi6byTwRUbHQt40OSErBnQ4j6G_BZvA-oJRM8) | planforge-dags-and-intelligence-arbitrage (PlanForge DAGs and Intelligence Arbitrage); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); fast-generation-architectures (Fast Generation Architectures); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); simulation-fidelity-and-physical-constraints (Simulation Fidelity and Physical Constraints); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); policy-optimization-and-learning-from-feedback (Policy Optimization and Learning from Feedback); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `coilmoecot` | CoilMoECOT Whitepaper v2.0 | `optional_technical_appendix` | `mathematical_search_substrate` | [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1iwhhRGr7vj_Sr4UwwM_yX_ESSyisoWur) | mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `temporal_coil_research` | Temporal Coil Research | `optional_technical_appendix` | `mathematical_search_substrate` | [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1PSQsAwMurlVRdsM6r_zRd2MPLZYv0qXH) | mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `bugbrain` | BugBrain | `optional_support` | `edge_efficiency_lineage` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XR716XCo-WmvOpvGTGDmh9zbv44oiyjfcVDVQ1YibIc) | compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems and Residual Honesty); rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression (RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `project_theseus_whitepaper` | Project Theseus Whitepaper | `implementation_reference` | `report_first_rmi_prototype` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/docs/PROJECT_THESEUS_WHITEPAPER.md) | procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); moecot-runtime-and-multi-core-orchestration (MoECOT Runtime and Multi-Core Orchestration); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); compact-generative-systems-and-residual-honesty (Compact Generative Systems and Residual Honesty); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference (Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `theseus_plan_compiler` | Theseus Plan Compiler | `implementation_reference` | `planning_control` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/docs/THESEUS_PLAN_COMPILER.md) | integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference (Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `theseus_self_evolution_system` | Theseus Self-Evolution System | `implementation_reference` | `recursive_self_improvement_governance` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/docs/SELF_EVOLUTION_SYSTEM.md) | recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference (Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `theseus_architecture_gate` | Theseus Architecture Gate | `implementation_reference` | `readiness_gate_governance` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE_GATE.md) | recursive-self-improvement-boundaries (Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries); readiness-gates-residual-escrow-and-quarantine (Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine); moecot-runtime-and-multi-core-orchestration (MoECOT Runtime and Multi-Core Orchestration); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference (Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `theseus_operator_os` | Hive Operator OS and Work Board | `implementation_reference` | `labor_os_operator_surface` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/docs/HIVE_OPERATOR_OS.md) | runtime-adapters-tool-permissions-and-human-approval (Runtime Adapters, Tool Permissions, and Human Approval); procedural-memory-and-cognitive-loop-closure (Procedural Memory and Cognitive Loop Closure); routing-heads-and-specialist-cores (Routing Heads and Specialist Cores); moecot-runtime-and-multi-core-orchestration (MoECOT Runtime and Multi-Core Orchestration); personal-compute-hives-and-federated-edge-intelligence (Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence); artifact-steward-agents-and-living-project-governance (Artifact Steward Agents and Living Project Governance); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference (Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `theseus_circle_transfer` | Theseus Circle Calculus Transfer Lane | `implementation_reference` | `proof_contract_transfer` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/symliquid-rmi/blob/main/docs/CIRCLE_CALCULUS_TRANSFER.md) | mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts (Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts); coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers (CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers); benchmark-ratchets-and-anti-goodhart-evidence (Benchmark Ratchets and Anti-Goodhart Evidence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); project-theseus-as-report-first-implementation-reference (Project Theseus as Report-First Implementation Reference); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `circle_calculus_core` | Circle Calculus | `core_technical_source` | `proof_carrying_mathematical_substrate` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus) | mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts (Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `circle_ai_contract_suite` | Circle Calculus AI Contract Suite | `core_technical_source` | `proof_carrying_ai_contracts` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/docs/AI_CONTRACT_SUITE.md) | circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts (Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts); coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts (Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts); coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers (CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); open-research-agenda-and-bibliography-plan (Open Research Agenda and Bibliography Plan) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `circle_ai_architectures` | Circle AI Architectures | `core_technical_source` | `cyclic_ai_architecture` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_AI_01_CIRCLE_AI_ARCHITECTURES.md) | semantic-representation-and-tree-structured-models (Semantic Representation and Tree-Structured Models); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts (Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts); coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers (CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `coil_attention_memory` | Coil Attention and Memory | `core_technical_source` | `cyclic_attention_memory` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_AI_02_COIL_ATTENTION_AND_MEMORY.md) | coil-attention-cyclic-memory-and-recurrence-contracts (Coil Attention, Cyclic Memory, and Recurrence Contracts) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `coilra_multicoil_rope` | CoilRA and MultiCoil RoPE | `core_technical_source` | `cyclic_mixers_position_encoding` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_AI_03_COILRA_AND_MULTICOIL_ROPE.md) | semantic-representation-and-tree-structured-models (Semantic Representation and Tree-Structured Models); resource-economics-and-token-budgets (Resource Economics and Token Budgets); coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers (CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `rope_position_certifier` | Proof-Carrying RoPE Position Distinguishability | `core_technical_source` | `proof_carrying_position_contract` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_AI_04_ROPE_POSITION_CERTIFIER.md) | circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts (Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts); coilra-multicoil-rope-and-cyclic-mixers (CoilRA, MultiCoil RoPE, and Cyclic Mixers); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope) | source note available; citation not normalized |
| `proof_carrying_circular_computation` | Proof-Carrying Circular Computation | `supporting_technical_source` | `proof_carrying_compute_substrate` | [source](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_COMP_01_PROOF_CARRYING_CIRCULAR_COMPUTATION.md) | mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); circle-calculus-and-proof-carrying-ai-contracts (Circle Calculus and Proof-Carrying AI Contracts); executable-specifications-and-lean-proof-envelope (Executable Specifications and Lean Proof Envelope) | source note available; citation not normalized |

## Citation Policy

- Use stable source IDs for supplied corpus references until full citation metadata exists.
- Do not infer authors, dates, venues, versions, or publication status from titles alone.
- Do not cite a source as supporting a claim until its text has been ingested and a source note exists.
- Keep speculative or design-synthesis claims labeled as `argument` until source, prototype, or test evidence justifies promotion.
